name: Simone Ludwig
text: Der Besuch lohnt sich überhaupt nicht, da man die Gebäude nur von außen besichtigen kann. Die Informationen beschränken sich auf eine Info Tafel und wenige Bilder. Zeitverschwendung!
textTranslated: The visit is not worth it at all, as you can only see the buildings from the outside. The information is limited to an information board and a few pictures. A waste of time!
title: Dora AS

name: Wilfred Puntman
text: Bijzondere plek in de geschiedenis. Fraai om zo'n imposant gebouw te zien. Helaas niets van het oude binnenwerk te zien. Toch goed om daar even naar toe te gaan!
textTranslated: Special place in history. Nice to see such an imposing building. Unfortunately, nothing of the old interior can be seen. Still good to go there!
title: Dora AS

name: Ron Miel
text: Beeindruckend dieser Koloss aus Beton...was man aus einer alten U Boot Halle alles machen kann.
textTranslated: This colossus made of concrete is impressive... what you can do with an old submarine hall.
title: Dora AS

name: GG CC
text: Better options in Trondheim.
title: Dora AS

name: Marc Debus
text: Sehr intetessanter ort....heute Logistikzentrum
textTranslated: Very interesting place...now a logistics center
title: Dora AS

name: Herbert Gurtner
text: Leider nur von aussen zu besichtigen gib fast keine Infos
textTranslated: Unfortunately, only viewing it from the outside gives almost no information
title: Dora AS

name: Patrícia Silva
text: Sítio agradável pra se andar a pé pra baixa pois fica perto do mar
textTranslated: Nice place to walk downtown as it is close to the sea
title: Dora AS

name: Fredrik Holmqwist
text: Intressant ställe. Synd att man inte kan se det från insidan
textTranslated: Interesting place. Too bad you can't see it from the inside
title: Dora AS

name: Marius
text: Narrow space for delivery
title: Dora AS

name: Christian Hauff
text: Leider wird mehr versprochen als man dann tatsächlich sehen kann.
textTranslated: Unfortunately, more is promised than you can actually see.
title: Dora AS

name: Peder Lilleengen
text: Historisk
textTranslated: Historic
title: Dora AS

name: Sven Saar
text:
Die Bunker liegen am Wasser in einem Gewerbegebiet. Wer nicht ausgesprochen militärhistorisch interessiert ist, braucht nicht extra hierher zu fahren. Bei Busrundfahrten werden sie meist gezeigt.

Zugänglich sind sie von innen nicht, da sie in Gewerbeobjekte einbezogen worden sind. Doch von außen sind sie nach wie vor imposant.
textTranslated:
The bunkers are located on the water in an industrial area. If you're not particularly interested in military history, you don't need to go here. They are usually shown on bus tours.

They are not accessible from the inside because they have been incorporated into commercial properties. But from the outside they are still impressive.
title: Dora AS

name: Beathe K Mo
text: Nye spennende å oppleve
textTranslated: New exciting things to experience
title: Dora AS

name: Dex McHenry
text: Like the nearby Dora 2, this is a classic example of WW2 German military engineering. For most people it's a lot of ugly concrete and they are right. However the building is a solid structure which isn't going anywhere soon. While you cannot access the interior you can walk the perimeter. There are some information boards on the waterfront as well as the conning tower of a Norwegian submarine to help give some context to this former U-Boat base.
title: Dora I

name: Tor Stølen
text: Ubåtbunkers fra 2. verdenskrig
textTranslated: Submarine bunkers from World War 2
title: Dora I

name: Ronny Nordvåg
text:
Bowling
Sur bestjening.
textTranslated:
Bowling
Sour cattle.
title: Dora I

name: Chris Strait
text: There isn't any tour and you cannot see inside but was amazing to see in person from the outside.
title: Dora I

name: Simens Isbar
text: En fin plass
textTranslated: A nice place
title: Dora I

name: Christoph Schaffeld
text: Interessant 🧐 aber kein Muss da die Anlage mittlerweile anders genutzt wird
textTranslated: Interesting 🧐 but not a must as the facility is now used differently
title: Dora I

name: Jean-louis Bernard
text: Voir la cathédrale  et la vieille ville.  Le reste, évitez !
textTranslated: See the cathedral and the old town.  The rest, avoid!
title: Dora I

name: Christian Vincent Pettersen Gustavsen
text: Gøy å spille bowling her.
textTranslated: Have fun bowling here.
title: Dora I

name: Robin Loe
text:
Bra og bruke et ellers utilgjengelig areal til noe fornuftig, og relevant i hennhold til stedes plassering og historie.

Ungene vil alltid ut å klatre på ubåten.. så litt frustrerende for de minste som ikke får lov når vi går forbi.. 😅
textTranslated:
Good to use an otherwise inaccessible area for something sensible, and relevant in terms of the site's location and history.

The kids always want to climb on the submarine.. so a bit frustrating for the little ones who are not allowed when we pass by.. 😅
title: Dora I

name: Ingeborg Støwer
text:
Tusen takk for at dere tok så godt  imot oss fra Aktivitetstilbud for hjemmeboende fra Ladesletta idag👌
14 stk i alderen 72 til 99 år, samt 4 ansatte🎶 vi  koste oss m bowling og pizzabuffet🍕🥤
textTranslated:
Thank you very much for welcoming us so well from Activity offer for home residents from Ladesletta today👌
14 people aged 72 to 99, as well as 4 employees🎶 we enjoyed bowling and a pizza buffet🍕🥤
title: Dora I

name: Alexander Lasen
text: Bra sted for å bowle med venner.
textTranslated: Good place to bowl with friends.
title: Dora I

name: outnorse
text: Et merkelig bygg. Kaldt å og stort. Ikke noe mere Spessielt enn en svær betong blokk.
textTranslated: A strange building. Cold and big. Nothing more special than a heavy concrete block.
title: Dora I

name: Mc Bona
text: Great place to walk around inside and out. Take in all the history in this monumental building and definitely recommend for anyone who is passing through, passionate about world war 2 history etc and doesn’t know when they might be back in Trondheim!
title: Dora I

name: Gareth Parry
text: Good to see that history is not being glossed over. U-Boat pens remain, now 'repurposed' by various businesses. Informative plaque on one of the original steel doors, worth a read followed by a walk around the exterior.
title: Dora I

name: Marco Mazzitelli
text: Very nice social place,bowling, shuffle board, pool, you name it and they have it
title: Dora I

name: Nost romo
text: Pięknie zachowany obiekt z czasów drugiej wojny światowej, baza ubotów. Duża kręgielnia fajny bilard spoko restauracje. Polecam
textTranslated: A beautifully preserved facility from World War II, a Ubot base. Large bowling alley, nice billiards, cool restaurants. I recommend
title: Dora I

name: Iron Fist
text: Best place for fun in the city. Great people work there. Prices are fair. 😊👍👍👍
title: Dora I

name: Halvor Bergan
text: Massiv
textTranslated: Massive
title: Dora I

name: Bård Hustad
text: Meget bra service av Bowling og Biljard klubben, anbefaler å slå av et par fire timer der en kveld 🏅
textTranslated: Very good service from the Bowling and Billiards club, recommend spending a couple of four hours there one evening 🏅
title: Dora I

name: Atle Wold
text: En koloss med mye innhold.
textTranslated: A colossus with a lot of content.

Prices acceptable, check it out.

textTranslated: Perfectly decent bowling, located a bit out of the way if you are not familiar with Trondheim.
title: Dora I
